steps.title: Identify the structure of the equation
steps.content:
The equation $10,000 = 2,200 + 200t$ represents:
Total price = Down payment + Monthly payments
On the right side, \$2,200$ is the down payment. The term $200t$ represents the total amount paid through monthly payments, where $t$ is the number of payments.

steps.title: Determine what 200 represents
steps.content:
In the expression $200t$, the structure is (coefficient) × (number of payments) = total paid from monthly payments.

For this pattern to work: coefficient = amount per payment.

Therefore, \$200$ is the amount of each fixed monthly payment. That matches choice B — B is correct.
